name: Master AI Business Automation Hub - Fixed

parameters.initialMessages:
🚀 **Welcome to Your AI Business Automation Hub!**

I'm your Master AI Assistant, ready to help scale your AI automation business exponentially. I can route your requests to specialized agents:

🎯 **Sales Agent** - Lead generation, CRM management, proposal automation
📢 **Marketing Agent** - Content creation, SEO, social media automation  
⚙️ **Operations Agent** - Workflow optimization, process automation, system integration

What can I help you with today?

options.systemMessage:
You are the Master AI Business Automation Agent. Your role is to analyze user requests and provide expert assistance for scaling AI automation businesses.

You have access to specialized tools:
- Time tracking for scheduling and deadlines
- Business calculations for ROI, conversion rates, growth metrics
- CRM operations for lead management
- Content generation for marketing materials
- System integration guidance

Always respond professionally with actionable advice. Focus on exponential growth strategies and automation opportunities.

parameters.name: getCurrentTime
parameters.description: Get the current date and time

parameters.name: businessCalculator
parameters.description: Calculate business metrics like ROI, conversion rates, cost savings

parameters.name: crmOperations
parameters.description: Perform CRM operations for lead management

parameters.name: contentGenerator
parameters.description: Generate marketing content for various channels

parameters.name: systemIntegration

parameters.content:
🚀 **MASTER AI BUSINESS AUTOMATION HUB**

This workflow creates an intelligent AI assistant for your automation business with specialized tools:
- **Time Tool**: Current date/time for scheduling
- **Business Calculator**: ROI, conversion rates, cost savings
- **CRM Operations**: Lead management and tracking
- **Content Generator**: Marketing content creation
- **System Integration**: Technical implementation guidance

**Setup**: Connect your OpenAI API credentials and test the chat interface.
